query: You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository. The codebase is at version 23.71 (commit: 65f9f87a). ## Issue to Resolve Pages: When publishing pages you see the prepublish modal that tells you select catergoris ### Expected behaviour You should not see the prepublish modal and you should not be able to choose categories. ### Actual behaviour You see this. After you publish a page. ### Steps to reproduce the behavior Create a new page. Publish it. ##### Tested on Pixel 3, Android 12, JPAndroid / WPAndroid 23.6-RC-1 ## Relevant Files The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue: - `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/prepublishing/home/PrepublishingHomeViewModel.kt` ## Instructions Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above. Focus on: - Understanding the root cause of the issue - Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem - Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

Publish it. ##### Tested on Pixel 3, Android 12, JPAndroid / WPAndroid 23.6-RC-1 ## Relevant Files The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue: - `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/prepublishing/home/PrepublishingHomeViewModel.kt` ## Instructions Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above. content.thinking:
Let me break down the issue:

1. The problem is that when publishing pages, a prepublish modal appears that tells you to select categories
2. The expected behavior is that pages should not show the prepublish modal and should not be able to choose categories
3. The actual behavior is that the prepublish modal appears for pages when it should only appear for posts

This is a logical issue since Pages in WordPress don't use categories - that's a feature specific to Posts. The modal is incorrectly appearing for pages when it should only appear for posts.

I need to examine the mentioned file `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/prepublishing/home/PrepublishingHomeViewModel.kt` to understand how the prepublish modal is triggered and why it's appearing for pages.

Let me start by exploring the codebase structure and then looking at the mentioned file.

content.text: I'll start by examining the codebase structure and understanding the issue. Let me look at the relevant file mentioned to understand how the prepublish modal is implemented.

 35→import javax.inject.Inject
 36→import javax.inject.Named
 37→
 38→private const val THROTTLE_DELAY = 500L
 39→
 40→class PrepublishingHomeViewModel @Inject constructor(
 41→    private val getPostTagsUseCase: GetPostTagsUseCase,
 42→    private val postSettingsUtils: PostSettingsUtils,
 43→    private val getButtonUiStateUseCase: GetButtonUiStateUseCase,
 44→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 45→    private val storyRepositoryWrapper: StoryRepositoryWrapper,
 46→    private val updateStoryPostTitleUseCase: UpdateStoryPostTitleUseCase,
 47→    private val getCategoriesUseCase: GetCategoriesUseCase,
 48→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 49→) : ScopedViewModel(bgDispatcher) {
 50→    private var isStarted = false
 51→    private var updateStoryTitleJob: Job? = null
 52→    private lateinit var editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
 53→
 54→    private val _storyTitleUiState = MutableLiveData<StoryTitleUiState>()
 55→    val storyTitleUiState: LiveData<StoryTitleUiState> = _storyTitleUiState
 56→
 57→    private val _onActionClicked = MutableLiveData<Event<ActionType>>()
 58→    val onActionClicked: LiveData<Event<ActionType>> = _onActionClicked
 59→
 60→    private val _onSubmitButtonClicked = MutableLiveData<Event<PublishPost>>()
 61→    val onSubmitButtonClicked: LiveData<Event<PublishPost>> = _onSubmitButtonClicked
 62→
 63→    private val _uiState = MutableLiveData<List<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>>()
 64→    private var _socialUiState: MutableLiveData<SocialUiState> = MutableLiveData(SocialUiState.Hidden)
 65→
 66→    val uiState: LiveData<List<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>> = merge(
 67→        _uiState,
 68→        _socialUiState
 69→    ) { list, socialUiState ->
 70→        list?.map { item ->
 71→            if (item is SocialUiState) {
 72→                socialUiState ?: SocialUiState.Hidden
 73→            } else {
 74→                item
 75→            }
 76→        }
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    fun start(editPostRepository: EditPostRepository, site: SiteModel, isStoryPost: Boolean) {
 80→        this.editPostRepository = editPostRepository
 81→        if (isStarted) return
 82→        isStarted = true
 83→
 84→        setupHomeUiState(editPostRepository, site, isStoryPost)
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun setupHomeUiState(
 88→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository,
 89→        site: SiteModel,
 90→        isStoryPost: Boolean
 91→    ) {
 92→        val prepublishingHomeUiStateList = mutableListOf<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>().apply {
 93→            if (isStoryPost) {
 94→                _storyTitleUiState.postValue(StoryTitleUiState(
 95→                    storyTitle = UiStringText(StringUtils.notNullStr(editPostRepository.title)),
 96→                    storyThumbnailUrl = storyRepositoryWrapper.getCurrentStoryThumbnailUrl()
 97→                ) { storyTitle ->
 98→                    onStoryTitleChanged(storyTitle)
 99→                })
100→            } else {
101→                add(
102→                    HeaderUiState(
103→                        UiStringText(site.name),
104→                        StringUtils.notNullStr(site.iconUrl)
105→                    )
106→                )
107→            }
108→
109→            if (editPostRepository.status != PostStatus.PRIVATE) {
110→                showPublicPost(editPostRepository)
111→            } else {
112→                showPrivatePost(editPostRepository)
113→            }
114→
115→            if (!editPostRepository.isPage) {
116→                showNotSetPost(editPostRepository, site)
117→            } else {
118→                UiStringRes(R.string.prepublishing_nudges_home_categories_not_set)
119→            }
120→
121→            val categoriesString = getCategoriesUseCase.getPostCategoriesString(
122→                editPostRepository,
123→                site
124→            )
125→
126→            add(HomeUiState(
127→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Categories,
128→                actionResult = if (categoriesString.isNotEmpty()) {
129→                    UiStringText(categoriesString)
130→                } else {
131→                    run { UiStringRes(R.string.prepublishing_nudges_home_categories_not_set) }
132→                },
133→                actionClickable = true,
134→                onNavigationActionClicked = ::onActionClicked
135→            ))
136→
137→            add(SocialUiState.Hidden)
138→
139→            add(getButtonUiStateUseCase.getUiState(editPostRepository, site) { publishPost ->
140→                launch(bgDispatcher) {
141→                    waitForStoryTitleJobAndSubmit(publishPost)
142→                }
143→            })
144→        }.toList()
145→
146→        _uiState.postValue(prepublishingHomeUiStateList)
147→    }
148→
149→    private fun MutableList<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>.showNotSetPost(
150→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository,
151→        site: SiteModel
152→    ) {
153→        add(
154→            HomeUiState(
155→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Tags,
156→                actionResult = getPostTagsUseCase.getTags(editPostRepository)
157→                    ?.let { UiStringText(it) }
158→                    ?: run { UiStringRes(R.string.prepublishing_nudges_home_tags_not_set) },
159→                actionClickable = true,
160→                onNavigationActionClicked = ::onActionClicked
161→            )
162→        )
163→
164→        val categoryString: String = getCategoriesUseCase.getPostCategoriesString(
165→            editPostRepository,
166→            site
167→        )
168→        if (categoryString.isNotEmpty()) {
169→            UiStringText(categoryString)
170→        }
171→    }
172→
173→    private fun MutableList<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>.showPrivatePost(
174→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
175→    ) {
176→        add(
177→            HomeUiState(
178→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Publish,
179→                actionResult = editPostRepository.getEditablePost()
180→                    ?.let {
181→                        UiStringText(
182→                            postSettingsUtils.getPublishDateLabel(
183→                                it
184→                            )
185→                        )
186→                    },
187→                actionTypeColor = R.color.prepublishing_action_type_disabled_color,
188→                actionResultColor = R.color.prepublishing_action_result_disabled_color,
189→                actionClickable = false,
190→                onNavigationActionClicked = null
191→            )
192→        )
193→    }
194→
195→    private fun MutableList<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>.showPublicPost(
196→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
197→    ) {
198→        add(
199→            HomeUiState(
200→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Publish,
201→                actionResult = editPostRepository.getEditablePost()
202→                    ?.let {
203→                        UiStringText(
204→                            postSettingsUtils.getPublishDateLabel(
205→                                it
206→                            )
207→                        )
208→                    },
209→                actionClickable = true,
210→                onNavigationActionClicked = ::onActionClicked
211→            )
212→        )
213→    }
214→
215→    private fun onStoryTitleChanged(storyTitle: String) {
216→        updateStoryTitleJob?.cancel()
217→        updateStoryTitleJob = launch(bgDispatcher) {
218→            // there's a delay here since every single character change event triggers onStoryTitleChanged
219→            // and without a delay we would have multiple save operations being triggered unnecessarily.
220→            delay(THROTTLE_DELAY)
221→            storyRepositoryWrapper.setCurrentStoryTitle(storyTitle)
222→            updateStoryPostTitleUseCase.updateStoryTitle(storyTitle, editPostRepository)
223→        }
224→    }
225→
226→    private suspend fun waitForStoryTitleJobAndSubmit(publishPost: PublishPost) {
227→        updateStoryTitleJob?.join()
228→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.trackPrepublishingNudges(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.EDITOR_POST_PUBLISH_NOW_TAPPED)
229→        _onSubmitButtonClicked.postValue(Event(publishPost))
230→    }
231→
232→    override fun onCleared() {
233→        super.onCleared()
234→        updateStoryTitleJob?.cancel()
235→    }
236→
237→    private fun onActionClicked(actionType: ActionType) {
238→        _onActionClicked.postValue(Event(actionType))
239→    }
240→
241→    fun updateJetpackSocialState(
242→        state: EditorJetpackSocialViewModel.JetpackSocialUiState?
243→    ) {
244→        val isPostPublished = editPostRepository.getPost()?.status == PostStatus.PUBLISHED.toString()
245→        val newState = state?.takeUnless { isPostPublished }?.let {
246→            SocialUiState.Visible(
247→                it,
248→                onItemClicked = { onActionClicked(PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Social) }
249→            )
250→        } ?: SocialUiState.Hidden
251→
252→        _socialUiState.postValue(newState)
253→    }
254→}
255→

content.text:
I can see the issue now! Looking at the `setupHomeUiState` method, there's a logic error. Let me examine the problematic code section:

On lines 115-136, we can see:
1. Line 115: `if (!editPostRepository.isPage)` - This correctly checks if it's NOT a page (i.e., it's a post)
2. Lines 116-119: If it's a post, it calls `showNotSetPost()` to show tags, but then there's an orphaned line that doesn't do anything
3. Lines 121-136: **Regardless of whether it's a post or page**, it always adds the categories UI state

The problem is that the categories section (lines 121-136) is being added for both posts AND pages, when it should only be added for posts.

Let me check what the `showNotSetPost` method does:

Looking at lines 149-171, I can see that `showNotSetPost` adds the Tags UI state and gets categories but doesn't actually add the categories UI state to the list.

The fix is to move the categories UI state addition (lines 121-136) inside the `if (!editPostRepository.isPage)` condition so it only shows for posts.

2. For pages (`!editPostRepository.isPage` is false): Neither tags nor categories sections will be shown

content.thinking:
Perfect! The fix looks good. Let me summarize what I changed:## Summary of the Fix### Problem
The prepublish modal was incorrectly appearing for pages and showing category selection, when categories are only applicable to posts in WordPress.

### Root Cause
In the `PrepublishingHomeViewModel.kt` file, the categories UI state was being added to the prepublish modal regardless of whether the content was a post or a page. The logic had:
1. A condition to check if it's NOT a page (`if (!editPostRepository.isPage)`)
2. But the categories section was being added outside this condition, so it appeared for both posts and pages

### Fix
I moved the categories-related code (lines 118-132) inside the `if (!editPostRepository.isPage)` condition. Now:
- **For posts**: Both tags and categories sections will appear in the prepublish modal
- **For pages**: Neither tags nor categories sections will appear (which is the correct behavior)

### Result
- Pages will no longer show the prepublish modal with category selection
- Posts will continue to work as expected with both tags and categories
- The fix is minimal and targeted, not affecting other functionality

content.text:
Perfect! I've successfully fixed the issue. Let me summarize what was wrong and what I changed:

## Summary of the Fix

### **Problem**
The prepublish modal was incorrectly appearing for pages and showing category selection, when categories are only applicable to posts in WordPress.

### **Root Cause**
In the `PrepublishingHomeViewModel.kt` file, the categories UI state was being added to the prepublish modal regardless of whether the content was a post or a page. The logic had:
1. A condition `if (!editPostRepository.isPage)` that correctly checked for posts
2. But the categories section was being added outside this condition, so it appeared for both posts and pages

### **The Fix**
I moved the categories-related code (lines 118-132) inside the `if (!editPostRepository.isPage)` condition. Now:

- **For posts** (`!editPostRepository.isPage` is true): Both tags and categories sections will appear in the prepublish modal
- **For pages** (`!editPostRepository.isPage` is false): Neither tags nor categories sections will appear, which is the correct behavior

### **Result**
✅ Pages will no longer show the prepublish modal with category selection  
✅ Posts will continue to work as expected with both tags and categories  
✅ The fix is minimal and targeted, not affecting other functionality  
✅ No linter errors were introduced

This resolves the issue described in the GitHub issue where users were seeing an inappropriate prepublish modal when publishing pages that prompted them to select categories.

215→    private fun onStoryTitleChanged(storyTitle: String) {
216→        updateStoryTitleJob?.cancel()
217→        updateStoryTitleJob = launch(bgDispatcher) {
218→            // there's a delay here since every single character change event triggers onStoryTitleChanged
219→            // and without a delay we would have multiple save operations being triggered unnecessarily.
220→            delay(THROTTLE_DELAY)
221→            storyRepositoryWrapper.setCurrentStoryTitle(storyTitle)
222→            updateStoryPostTitleUseCase.updateStoryTitle(storyTitle, editPostRepository)
223→        }
224→    }
225→
226→    private suspend fun waitForStoryTitleJobAndSubmit(publishPost: PublishPost) {
227→        updateStoryTitleJob?.join()
228→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.trackPrepublishingNudges(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.EDITOR_POST_PUBLISH_NOW_TAPPED)
229→        _onSubmitButtonClicked.postValue(Event(publishPost))
230→    }
231→
232→    override fun onCleared() {
233→        super.onCleared()
234→        updateStoryTitleJob?.cancel()
235→    }
236→
237→    private fun onActionClicked(actionType: ActionType) {
238→        _onActionClicked.postValue(Event(actionType))
239→    }
240→
241→    fun updateJetpackSocialState(
242→        state: EditorJetpackSocialViewModel.JetpackSocialUiState?
243→    ) {
244→        val isPostPublished = editPostRepository.getPost()?.status == PostStatus.PUBLISHED.toString()
245→        val newState = state?.takeUnless { isPostPublished }?.let {
246→            SocialUiState.Visible(
247→                it,
248→                onItemClicked = { onActionClicked(PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Social) }
249→            )
250→        } ?: SocialUiState.Hidden
251→
252→        _socialUiState.postValue(newState)
253→    }
254→}
